news.headline: MedHQ names Michael Drucker as CFO, bringing 20 years of experience in finance and payor expertise.
news.summary: A highly experienced executive from HCSC/Blue Cross Blue Shield of Illinois has joined MedHQ in Westchester, Illinois, bringing with them more than 20 years of expertise in finance and payor services. MedHQ is a prominent healthcare advisory and administrative solutions provider for hospitals and health systems. The appointment was announced on October 10, 2024, through a press release by PR Newswire.

news.headline: 100 Teamsters Local 238 members at Cargill are on strike, rallying for a fair contract as the largest private company.
news.summary: In Cedar Rapids, Iowa, a rally is scheduled to take place on Oct. 10, 2024, at 4:00 p.m. to show support for 100 Teamsters Local 238 members at Cargill who have initiated a strike. Cargill, the world's largest privately held corporation, is the company involved in the labor dispute with the union.

news.headline: Fastenal to report Q3 earnings, expected at 52 cents/share with revenue of $1.91 billion. August sales $652.65 million, down 2.3%. Stock gained 0.6% to close at $70.61.
news.summary: Fastenal Company is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Friday, Oct. 11, with analysts predicting earnings of 52 cents per share, steady compared to the same period last year. Revenue is forecasted to increase to $1.91 billion from $1.85 billion in the previous year. As of September 6, the company reported a 2.3% decrease in August sales, reaching $652.65 million. On Wednesday, Fastenal's shares closed at $70.61, marking a 0.6% increase. For further insights, readers can refer to the Benzinga Pro data platform or visit their Analyst Stock Ratings page for the latest analyst assessments.

news.headline: France's construction industry is projected to grow steadily with a CAGR of 2.8% during 2024-2028, supporting economic growth.
news.summary: A report on the France Construction Industry Databook Series has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The construction industry in France is predicted to experience substantial growth, with projections indicating steady expansion over the next four quarters. Furthermore, a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 2.8% is expected during the period of 2024-2028. This growth trend is anticipated to persist throughout the forecast period, suggesting positive developments in the industry's output.

news.headline: CPSC announces Fisher-Price recall of over 2 million Snuga Infant Swings due to suffocation hazard after 5 deaths.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) disclosed that, in cooperation with certain companies, several recalls have been issued. These recalls, involving Fisher-Price, affect over 2 million Snuga Infant Swings due to a suffocation risk following five reported deaths. Further information on these recalls can be found on the CPSC website at www.cpsc.gov.

news.headline: NEXTCHEM's subsidiary KT Tech awarded licensing for hydrogen production in Vietnam. NX Reform™ tech to be used in Dung Quat Refinery upgrade.
news.summary: KT Tech, a subsidiary of NEXTCHEM, has secured a deal to provide the licensing and process design package for their NX Reform™ hydrogen technology. This agreement is part of the Dung Quat Refinery's expansion project in Vietnam and includes the supply of proprietary steam methane. The project aims to enhance the refinery's capabilities and is a significant step toward future growth.

news.headline: Inventor from Canada creates C C BIN lock box system to safeguard package deliveries.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 10, 2024, an inventor from Utterson, Ontario, Canada, expressed the inspiration behind creating a novel lock box system to safeguard package deliveries from theft and harsh weather conditions. The inventor introduced the C C BIN, aiming to provide enhanced security and protection for packages during transit. This innovation also incorporates features to provide real-time updates to owners regarding the status of their deliveries.

news.headline: Certificate Authority market to exceed USD 485.13 million by 2033, crucial for cybersecurity with focus on integration and blockchain tech.
news.summary: The global Certificate Authority (CA) market is crucial for issuing, managing, and renewing digital certificates used to authenticate entities and secure network interactions. CAs play a vital role in maintaining cybersecurity and trust in digital communications and transactions. The market is evolving as CAs expand services to include cybersecurity solutions and integrate with other security services, enhancing protection for organizations. The emergence of Blockchain Technology is creating new opportunities by improving security and transparency in certificate issuance. North America leads the market share, with a projected CAGR of XX%. For instance, in October 2023, DigiCert integrated its services with Acronis, while in March 2024, Tezos introduced a blockchain-based certificate management system named Tezos DigiSign.

news.headline: Keeper Security partners with Williams Racing at F1 US Grand Prix in Austin, showcasing interactive activities at Fan Zone.
news.summary: Be a part of the Williams Racing Fan Zone sponsored by Kraken in Austin, Texas on October 10, 2024. The event will offer free interactive activities such as Keeper's Spin Cam. Keeper Security, a top cybersecurity company specializing in zero-trust and zero-knowledge solutions, is hosting the event.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: Housing demand could rise faster than supply.
CORSAIR partners with Call of Duty in a multi-year collaboration, launching high-performance products. $CRSR on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Based in Milpitas, California, CORSAIR® (Nasdaq: CRSR), a prominent developer and producer of high-performance gear and technology for gamers, content creators, and PC enthusiasts, has initiated the launch of its initial products in a long-term, comprehensive collaboration with the popular Call of Duty franchise. This innovative integration marks the first time these top gaming brands join forces, with the collaboration spanning across various products over a multi-year period.

news.headline: Elon Musk forecasts Tesla's self-driving 'Robotaxi' to boost stock value by trillions; doubters advised to sell shares.
news.summary: Elon Musk recently predicted that the vehicle would contribute significantly to Tesla's market value, potentially adding trillions to the company's worth. He suggested that those who doubt this claim should consider selling their shares.

news.headline: Phison's PASCARI D200V QLC and X200 TLC SSD products are recognized as OCP Inspired ™ by Open Compute Project.
news.summary: A tech company based in San Jose, California, Phison Electronics (stock symbol 8299TT) has been honored with the OCP Inspired™ recognition for their Pascari D200V QLC and X200 TLC SSD products. These products meet the demanding datacenter NVMe SSD specifications set by the Open Compute Project. As a result, these drives have been added to the OCP Marketplace after successfully completing a thorough evaluation process to ensure they meet OCP's high standards.

news.headline: Global database encryption market was $3.6 billion in 2023, expected to reach $21.9 billion by 2030, growing at 29.5% CAGR. Key players include Gemalto, Intel Security, McAfee, Microsoft, NetApp, Oracle, Sophos, and Symantec.
news.summary: Dublin - The global market for Database Encryption, as reported in the "Database Encryption - Global Strategic Business Report," was valued at approximately US$3.6 billion in 2023. It is anticipated to witness substantial growth and reach around US$21.9 billion by 2030, showing a remarkable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 29.5% during the forecast period of 2023 to 2030. Database encryption is a crucial process that involves encrypting data with a cryptographic key before storing it on a disk, ensuring that only authorized individuals with the decryption key can access and read the information, thereby offering robust data security measures.

news.headline: Amazon Pharmacy to expand to 20 more U.S. cities by 2025 with same-day prescription delivery. 45% eligible for fast service.
news.summary: Amazon Pharmacy is set to expand its pharmacy services to an additional 20 cities in the United States by the year 2025. The expansion will include fast and free delivery of prescription medications. These new pharmacies will be integrated into Amazon's Same-Day Delivery facilities, allowing for quick medication distribution.The service emphasizes a digital-first approach, with round-the-clock access to pharmacists and multiple opportunities for savings on medications. By 2025, it is anticipated that around 45% of customers in the U.S. will be eligible for same-day delivery, facilitating the arrival of medications within a few hours of ordering.Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is utilizing its extensive logistics network to establish a speedy and effective pharmacy service that directly dispatches medications to customers.

news.headline: ExxonMobil & HELLENiQ ENERGY complete initial exploration phase in Crete, plan for next steps. 3,250km 2D seismic data collected, second phase to focus on 3D data over 3 years.
news.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) and HELLEniQ ENERGY have finished the first exploration phase in the offshore block "Southwest of Crete." The project involved the collection of 3,250 km of 2D seismic data and geochemical analyses. The joint venture, along with HEREMA, has decided to move forward with the second phase, which will span three years and concentrate on 3D seismic data collection and assessment. In the first quarter of 2024, ExxonMobil and HELLEniQ ENERGY will continue their exploration efforts.

news.headline: VersaFeed utilizes AI to optimize product feeds, with a year-long study showing increased engagement and conversion rates.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 10, 2024, VersaFeed revealed significant findings from a one-year investigation showcasing the effectiveness of artificial intelligence (AI) in improving product feeds for Google Merchant Center. Through the enhancement and creation of product data, VersaFeed achieved groundbreaking results...

news.headline: TD Bank faces $3B penalty in US settlement over anti-money laundering failures, growth limits imposed. Monitor agencies involved.
news.summary: TD Bank (NYSE:TD) is said to be on the brink of resolving allegations of neglecting to monitor money laundering by drug cartels, as reported exclusively by the Wall Street Journal. The Canadian bank is anticipated to fork out around $3 billion in fines and confront constraints on expanding in the U.S. In the pending settlement, TD Bank's U.S. division is likely to enter a guilty plea in response to criminal charges following a probe by the Department of Justice. This development, involving multiple authorities such as the DOJ, OCC, FinCEN, and Federal Reserve, could be disclosed today. As per the WSJ, the DOJ and FinCEN are expected to assign independent overseers to ensure the bank adheres to laws against money laundering.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: I see risk that lower rates could boost housing demand.
CFP Board receives $150,000 donation from Schwab for WIN Endowed Scholarship. Total contribution now...
news.summary: In Washington on October 10, 2024, the CFP Board revealed that a substantial $150,000 donation has been made by Schwab Advisor Services in collaboration with the Charles Schwab Foundation. The funds will go towards the Women's Initiative (WIN) Endowed Scholarship. This sizeable donation boosts the overall support for the scholarship.

news.headline: AMTD, AMTD Digital, and L’Officiel collaborate to launch L’Officiel Japan with digital/print versions & social media sharing.
news.summary: AMTD IDEA Group (NYSE: AMTD; SGX: HKB), AMTD Digital Inc. (NYSE: HKD), and L’Officiel Group Inc. have jointly introduced the inaugural Japan Issue of L’Officiel, a prestigious French fashion media brand established over 100 years ago. The launch includes digital and print editions, in addition to a wide array of content posted across popular social media platforms like Instagram, Threads, Facebook, and X. This collaboration marks a significant milestone for L’Officiel as it expands its reach in the fashion industry.

news.headline: Global bio-digester market valued at $30.2B in 2023, projected to reach $54.3B by 2033, growing at a 6.1% CAGR.
news.summary: The Allied Market Research report titled "Bio-digester Market" provides insights into the global bio-digester market. Valued at $30.2 billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach $54.3 billion by 2033, with a growth rate of 6.1% from 2024 to 2033. The market is driven by factors such as the increase in greenhouse gas emissions, the promotion of sustainable practices, and the surge in demand for renewable energy sources. However, challenges include the high upfront investment for bio-digester systems and potential competition for land between biomass and food production leading to food security issues. The report covers market segments based on type, feedstock, end-use, and region. This comprehensive report spans 300 pages and offers valuable insights for industry players.

news.headline: Wave Digital Assets appoints Jim Robnett as Chief of Government Operations, enhancing regulatory compliance.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Wave Digital Assets (Wave), an SEC-registered digital asset investment management firm, made an announcement in Los Angeles and London about appointing Jim Robnett as their Chief of Government Operations. This strategic move is significant as Wave expands its operations and strengthens its foothold in the industry.

news.headline: Global Closed System Drug Transfer Device (CSTD) market valued at $0.8B in 2023, projected to reach $3.6B by 2033 at 15.7% CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the Closed System Drug Transfer Device (CSTD) market. In 2023, the market was valued at $0.8 billion and is projected to reach $3.6 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.7% from 2024 to 2033. The key drivers for market growth are the increasing prevalence of cancer cases and a focus on worker safety, while high costs and device maintenance act as hindrances. However, there are opportunities for market expansion due to increased awareness of health risks. The report covers various aspects of the market and provides details on forecast period, base year, market sizes in 2023 and 2033, and the CAGR.

news.headline: Simply Business partners with Sky's The Limit to empower small business owners. Partnership announced on October 10, 2024.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Simply Business, LLC, a top digital insurance broker specializing in small businesses, revealed a collaboration with Sky's The Limit (STL), a non-profit committed to assisting emerging small businesses from underrepresented communities. This partnership aims to provide support and resources to help these businesses thrive.

news.headline: MDU Resources Group, Inc. will webcast Q3 2024 earnings call on Nov. 7 at 2 p.m. ET, results to be released that day. NYSE: MDU.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, MDU Resources Group, Inc. will be broadcasting its third quarter earnings conference call at 2 p.m. ET on November 7. Prior to the U.S. financial markets opening on that day, the company will disclose its third quarter results. Those interested can access the webcast for this event where discussions on the financial performance will be held. MDU Resources Group, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol MDU.

news.headline: Sologic® releases Causelink® Version 8.0 with AI features for RCA, enhancing efficiency in problem-solving.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Midland, Michigan, Sologic® unveiled Causelink® Version 8.0, marking a significant advancement in problem-solving technology. This latest version integrates artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities, a move expected to significantly improve the Root Cause Analysis (RCA) process. Sologic®, a renowned global provider of problem-solving solutions, aims to enhance efficiency and streamline RCA with this release. This update is set to benefit organizations seeking to bolster their problem-solving capabilities, with Version 8.0 introducing cutting-edge AI features.

news.headline: Global microfluidics market set to reach USD 32.67 billion by 2029, growing at 7.8% CAGR from USD 22.43 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on October 10, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide microfluidics market is expected to increase from USD 22.43 billion in 2024 to USD 32.67 billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.8%. Factors fueling this growth comprise the increasing need for point-of-care diagnostics and advancements in the field.

news.headline: Animal antibacterial and antibiotics market set to reach USD 6.5 billion by 2031 due to rising livestock production and intensive farming practices.
news.summary: The Animal Antibacterial and Antibiotics Market is experiencing significant growth due to various factors. With the increase in livestock production and the adoption of intensive animal farming practices, there is a rising demand for efficient antibacterial and antibiotic solutions to maintain animal health and productivity. This trend is fueled by the growing emphasis on animal welfare and the need to meet the demands of a growing population. The market size is expected to reach $XX billion by XXXX, reflecting the importance of these treatments in the agriculture industry.

news.headline: Pneumatic tools market expected to reach $158.11B by 2030, with a growth rate of 13.81% CAGR. Industries driving demand include manufacturing and automotive, with automation trend boosting growth.
news.summary: The pneumatic tools market is witnessing significant growth globally, primarily led by the expanding manufacturing and automotive sectors. These industries are driving the demand for reliable and durable tools that can efficiently perform across a range of industrial applications. Moreover, the market is benefiting from the increasing adoption of industrial automation, further boosting growth prospects. The market's upward trajectory is indicative of the rising need for high-performance tools in various industries.

news.headline: IoT valves market to hit $2.85B by 2031, showing 10.4% CAGR from $1.29B in 2023. Report by The Insight Partners.
news.summary: The market size for IoT valves is projected to grow steadily, with an estimated value of US$ 1.29 billion in 2023 to US$ 2.85 billion by 2031, resulting in a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.4% during this period. A recent report by The Insight Partners highlights this trend, indicating a significant increase in the adoption of IoT valves. The data was released on October 10, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin: Inflation is headed in the right direction.
Westinghouse and Seaspan partner for nuclear projects, MoU signed. Seaspan to manufacture AP1000 and AP300 components.
news.summary: In Peterborough, Ontario, Westinghouse Electric Company and Seaspan ULC have recently entered into a memorandum of understanding (MoU) aiming to collaborate on nuclear new-build ventures in Canada and globally. This partnership allows Seaspan the opportunity to produce vital components for AP1000® and AP300™ reactors, such as pipe spools and steel structures. Known for its expertise in top-notch fabrication, Seaspan will play a crucial role in supporting the construction of these reactors. This alliance signals a significant step forward in the advancement of nuclear projects, solidifying Seaspan's position as a reliable manufacturer of key reactor parts.

news.headline: Dow Jones down due to inflation data, Tesla drops before Robotaxi event. Market reacts negatively.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell amid a surge in inflation. This drop occurred as Tesla's stock took a hit in anticipation of its upcoming Robotaxi event. The Dow Jones decreased by a significant margin, reflecting the impact of the inflation report. Tesla's value declined notably before the Robotaxi event, indicating investor concerns. This downward trend in the market was shaped by both economic factors and specific company developments.

news.headline: US Radiology Specialists expands Technologist Advancement Academy into mammography, addressing shortages. Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: The TAA program is providing avenues for career advancement to existing staff and potential new recruits, aiming to mitigate technologist shortages and improve patient access to diagnostic imaging services. Recently in Raleigh, North Carolina on October 10, 2024, US Radiology Specialists, Inc., a leading national entity in the field of radiology...

EIA Natural Gas Change BCF Actual 82B (Forecast 76B, Previous 55B)
Pfizer stock drops as former execs support CEO Bourla over activist investor Starboard in Thursday trading.
news.summary: The stock of Pfizer experienced a decline on Thursday following a decision by former executives Ian Read and Frank D'Amelio to support the company in its dispute with activist investor Starboard. The executives have chosen to side with CEO Albert Bourla, causing the stock to skid. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Florida insurers recover as Hurricane Milton hits land after experiencing significant stock losses, rebounding in market.
news.summary: Florida-based insurers saw a resurgence in the market on Thursday as Hurricane Milton hit land, following a period of significant stock declines earlier in the week. The turnaround was notable as the storm made its impact felt. The stocks of these insurers had shown a decrease due to the approaching hurricane, but they bounced back as the storm made landfall. This rejuvenation was observed after a period of uncertainty and losses, displaying the resilience of the insurers. The market response signified a rebound from the challenges posed by Hurricane Milton, highlighting the volatility and fluctuations that impact the insurance sector during such natural disasters. The recovery was particularly noteworthy as it showcased a quick reversal of fortunes for the Florida insurers who had been struggling in the face of the storm.

news.headline: ADMA Biologics' stock crashes after auditor resigns, but company maintains guidance for this year and next.
news.summary: On Thursday, the stock of ADMA Biologics saw a significant drop following the unexpected resignation of the company's auditor. Despite this setback, ADMA Biologics maintained its guidance for both this year and next. The highly regarded stock from IBD 50, ADMA Biologics, experienced a crash in response to this event.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines expects low earnings due to hurricanes hitting travel industry before November election.
news.summary: The travel industry is facing disruption as two consecutive hurricanes impact operations, causing concerns in anticipation of the upcoming Delta Air Lines earnings report. The company is expected to announce lower guidance amidst the uncertainty surrounding the November election and the recent impact of the hurricanes on travel.

news.headline: Social Security checks to increase by 2.5% in 2025 for 72.5M Americans, providing a small raise.
news.summary: The Social Security Administration has revealed that 72.5 million Americans will receive a 2.5% increase in their Social Security checks in 2025. This adjustment aims to provide retirees with a slight raise in their benefits for the upcoming year.

news.headline: Global Aircraft Exhaust System Market to hit $1959.06M by 2033. Growth fueled by air travel demand and materials/tech advancements.
news.summary: The aircraft exhaust system is a critical component that collects and redirects exhaust gases, ensuring safety, efficiency, and environmental responsibility in airplanes. The market is driven by the increasing demand for air travel, leading to a need for novel exhaust systems to support rigorous emissions regulations and the growth of global airlines' fleets. Advancements in materials and technology are creating opportunities for the market's growth, with innovations enabling reduced weight, enhanced durability, improved efficiency, and reduced fuel consumption. This trend aligns with the aviation industry's focus on sustainability and operational efficiency. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: D. E. Shaw Group urges Air Products and Chemicals to address underperformance, advocates for better capital allocation.
news.summary: Stresses the importance of the board participating in effective succession planning and advocating for a stricter capital allocation policy. Recently in New York on October 10, 2024, the D. E. Shaw group, a multinational investment and tech development company, emphasized these points. The firm boasts exceeding $60 billion in investment.

news.headline: U.S. DoJ subpoenas Saab NA for info on Brazil's purchase of 36 Gripen fighters in 2014. Stockholm, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: Saab North America, Inc., a U.S. branch of Saab, disclosed on October 10, 2024, that it has been served a subpoena by the U.S. Department of Justice. The subpoena pertains to details regarding the Brazilian Government's procurement of 36 Gripen E/F fighter jets for its air force. This inquiry signifies the U.S. government's interest in understanding this defense deal.

news.headline: SMArtX Advisory welcomes Allspring Global to SMArtY platform, expanding investment solutions. Fla firm offers tax-advantaged accounts.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, SMArtX Advisory Solutions revealed that Allspring Global Investments has become a part of the manager-sponsored platform SMArtY. This collaboration introduces Allspring's direct indexing abilities to the platform, enhancing its range of top investment solutions. The respected asset management firm, Allspring, will now provide its unique tax-efficient, personalized separately managed accounts.

news.headline: Tech and consumer discretionary stocks drop, utilities outperform; Annual CPI at 2.4%, core at 3.3%, jobless claims spike.
news.summary: September's Consumer Price Index (CPI) report revealed higher inflation than anticipated, impacting major stock indices in early New York trading. The unexpected spike in weekly jobless claims contributed to sector variations, with technology and consumer discretionary stocks experiencing declines while utilities saw a rebound from previous losses. The annual headline inflation rate dropped to 2.4% from August's 2.5%, surpassing economist expectations of 2.3%. Core inflation, excluding volatile food and energy prices, unexpectedly rose to 3.3% from 3.2%, marking the first increase since March 2023. The monthly inflation figures also showed...

news.headline: Grosvenor forms C$1.5B partnership to construct 1,730 homes in Metro Vancouver, part of a 7.9-acre project.
news.summary: Grosvenor, an international property owner and developer, has announced a major partnership with a Canadian pension fund and Westerkirk Capital Inc., a BC-based family office. This collaboration aims to construct 1,730 new homes as part of the initial phase of a large-scale project in Vancouver. The project will take place on a 7.9-acre master-planned site. The partnership signifies a significant investment and commitment to the development of the area.

news.headline: Tilray reported $200M Q1 net revenue, up 13% YoY, with a net loss improvement. CEO emphasizes innovation in CPG industry.
news.summary: Tilray Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: TLRY) released its financial results for the first fiscal quarter ending on August 31. The Canadian cannabis company reported a net revenue of $200 million, marking a 13% increase from the previous year's $177 million. However, this figure was a decrease from the previous quarter's $229.882 million. Chairman and CEO, Irwin D. Simon, expressed enthusiasm about Tilray's disruptive presence in the CPG industry with their innovative cannabis, hemp, and beverage products. Simon highlighted their strategic investments in various sectors to drive revenue growth, operational efficiencies, and enhanced profitability. The company remains committed to driving innovation and sustaining growth for the future. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Inflation set to ease in September with mixed news for policymakers in the latest C.P.I. report.
news.summary: The recent Consumer Price Index data shows a slowdown in the rate of increase, indicating moderation. However, the September report presents a mixed bag for policymakers.
